channel.title: Problem Sets on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Problem Sets on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: Binary search trees code
item.description: Supporting file for Problem set 2. Binary search trees code. (This zip file includes: 5 .py files and 1 .txt file.)

item.title: Change code
item.description: Supporting file for Problem set 6. Change code. (This zip file includes: 2 .py files.)

item.title: Code for Problem set 6
item.description: Supporting files for Problem set 6: All code for this problem set. (This zip file includes: 2 .png files, 10 .py files, and 1 .txt file.)

item.title: Dijkstra code
item.description: Supporting file for Problem set 5. Dijkstra code. (This zip file includes: 1 .lnk file, 1 .nod file, 5 .py files, and 3 .txt files. Note that nhpn.nod and nhpn.lnk are text files, and should be opened in a text editor.)

item.title: Document distance code
item.description: Supporting file for Problem set 1. Document distance code. (This zip file includes: 3 .py files and 5 .txt files.)

item.title: Fibonacci code
item.description: Supporting file for Problem set 6. Fibonacci code. (This zip file includes: 2 .py files.)

item.title: Gas simulation code
item.description: Supporting file for Problem set 3. Gas simulation code. (This zip file includes: 3 .py files and 1 .txt file.)

item.title: Heap code
item.description: Supporting file for Problem set 3. Heap code. (This zip file includes: 3 .py files and 1 .txt file.)

item.title: Image resizing code
item.description: Supporting file for Problem set 6. Image resizing code. (This zip file includes: 2 .png files, 4 .py files, and 1 .txt file.)

item.description: Handout 3 containing Problem set 1.
